summary: Completed backend testing of newly merged endpoints (lead file attachments, customer invitation/registration, customer account management). All 13 tests passed with 100% success rate.
passed_tests: Lead file upload (POST /api/leads/{lead_id}/files) - Accepts base64 data_url, returns file metadata
Lead file list (GET /api/leads/{lead_id}/files) - Returns array of file metadata
Lead file download (GET /api/leads/{lead_id}/files/{file_id}/download) - Returns file with data_url
Lead file delete (DELETE /api/leads/{lead_id}/files/{file_id}) - Removes file successfully
Customer invite generation (POST /api/customers/{customer_id}/invite) - Creates invite token
Customer invite validation (GET /api/customer-auth/validate-invite?token=...) - Validates token correctly
Customer invite acceptance (POST /api/customer-auth/accept-invite) - Sets password and completes registration
Customer password set by admin (POST /api/customers/{customer_id}/set-password) - Updates password successfully
Customer account info retrieval (GET /api/customers/{customer_id}/account) - Returns account state and metadata
Authentication enforcement - All protected endpoints return 401 without Bearer token
Route registration - No 404 errors, all endpoints properly registered
Authorization checks - Manager/admin role requirements enforced correctly
